title: Action Item CRUD API and UI
description: Implement action item REST API with flat-file persistence and frontend components for action item management within the meeting context. Action items are linked to meetings via meetingId.
designContext: ActionItem entity with fields: title (string, required), meetingId (reference, required), assignee (string), dueDate (date), status (enum: open/in-progress/done, default: open). Displayed within meeting detail page. Flat JSON file persistence in data/action-items.json.
